vBRIEFInfo.description: PROJECT-DEFINITION for git-unas. Generated by run v0.36.0.

narratives.Overview: git-unas -- A Node.js web admin page for a Ubiquiti UNAS device. Provides a browser UI to perform git clone, tar archiving, and file encryption operations on the NAS.
narratives.TechStack: Node.js + TypeScript + Express (or similar lightweight HTTP framework) for the backend; plain HTML/JS or a minimal frontend framework for the admin UI
